scripts.dev: astro build && pnpm run db:seed:local && wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.preview: pnpm run db:seed:local && wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.db:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute flashcard-db --local --config dist/server/wrangler.json --file=./seeds/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute flashcard-db --local --config dist/server/wrangler.json --file=./seeds/seed-card-types.sql && wrangler d1 execute flashcard-db --local --config dist/server/wrangler.json --file=./seeds/dbt-analytics-engineer.sql
